findings.finding: No screenshot, rendered UI capture, or other visual-specific artifact is present for the exact commit, so an affirmative visual pass cannot be established.

The confirmed implementation evidence binds clean local HEAD and branch artifact to 40750c297ed42435dabe1d4670bfda85ce92af36, but the required contemporaneous local HEAD and remote bos/issue-51 equality check could not execute because the read-only command sandbox helper was unavailable.

Existing exact-commit evidence reports all four pre-deployment acceptance criteria passed, including 363 tests, 100.00% coverage, Credo, Dialyzer, formatting, and diff checks; exact merged-artifact installation and service health remain post-merge coordinator responsibilities.

summary: Visual review is inconclusive: exact-commit functional evidence is passing, but affirmative visual evidence and a contemporaneous local/remote SHA confirmation are unavailable.
